title: Contact – Jeremy Corbyn MP
text_excerpt: Contact – Jeremy Corbyn MP Home About Me News Help & Advice Contact Vacancies Privacy Policy Home About Me News Help & Advice Contact Vacancies Privacy Policy Contact I want to reassure you that my office is progressing casework and supporting constituents in Islington North during this challenging and difficult time. There is currently a very large volume of daily correspondence in relation to how the new government guidelines on Coronavirus are impacting daily life so please do bear this in mind when making an enquiry that is not time-sensitive or urgent. All advice sessions are being held over the phone until further notice. If you would like information on dates, times, and how to book an appointment, please get in touch with my local office. If you live in Islington North ( click here to check if you are unsure ) and wish to contact me about a personal matter (e.g. housing, benefits, immigration, etc): Email : corbynj@parliament.uk Telephone: 020 7561 7488 Monday, Tuesday, Thursdays between 10am-12md Write: Rt Hon Jeremy Corbyn MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA Please read these CONTACT GUIDELINES carefully: If you live in Islington North and have a policy query: Email: corbynj@parliament.uk and include your full postcode in the subject heading. Parliamentary protocol requires that MPs only assist people who live in the constituency they represent. Therefore, if you do not live in Islington North please contact your local MP. All other queries (including invitations) can be sent to: Email: corbynj@parliament.uk Telephone: 0207 219 3545 Write: Rt Hon Jeremy Corbyn MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA You can also get advice and clarification on the links below: Government advice for the public Advice from Islington Council ACAS Employment Advice Evictions and protections for renters Rt Hon Jeremy Corbyn MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA Bluesky Facebook Instagram X Copyright © 2026 Rt Hon Jeremy Corbyn MP We use cookies to improve the visitor's experience. By clicking “Accept”, you consent to the use of necessary cookies. ACCEPT Manage consent Close Privacy Overview This website uses cookies to improve your experience while you navigate through the website. Out of these, the cookies that are categorized as necessary are stored on your browser as they are essential for the working of basic functionalities of the website. We also use third-party cookies that help us analyze and understand how you use this website. These cookies will be stored in your browser only with your consent. You also have the option to opt-out of these cookies. But opting out of some of these cookies may affect your browsing experience. Necessary Necessary Always Enabled Necessary cookies are absolutely essential for the website to function properly. This category only includes cookies that ensures basic functionalities and security features of the website. These cookies do not store any personal information. Non-necessary Non-necessary Any cookies that may not be particularly necessary for the website to function and is used specifically to collect user personal data via analytics, ads, other embedded contents are termed as non-necessary cookies. It is mandatory to procure user consent prior to running these cookies on your website. SAVE & ACCEPT
